headlines.title: SELECT NAME FOR NEW THEOLOGICAL COLLEGE OF T.C.U.
headlines.subtitle: Will Be Known as "The Brite College of the Bible" in Honor of the Man Who Made Endowment. TO ERECT $30,000 BUILDING AT ONCE Dr. Bacon Saunders of Fort Worth Is Made President of Board of Directors and Rev. L. D. Anderson, Secretary.

headlines.title: Man Who Gave $100,000 to Endow Theological College

headlines.subtitle: As Visitor Is Killed in Her Home by Another Suitor Her Husband Enters; Says She Has Learned Her Lesson.

headlines.title: RACES TO SAN ANTONIO TO SAVE HER BROTHER
headlines.subtitle: Prevents Gambler From Winning Crooked Game: District Attorney Is Killed by Burglar Whom He Had "Sent Up."

headlines.title: WILL MANUFACTURE PUNCTURE-PROOF INNER TUBES HERE
headlines.subtitle: B. H. Miller Applies for Patent on His Invention and Opens Plant to Begin Operations.

headlines.subtitle: Scalp Covered with Dandruff. Itching so Intense Could Not Sleep. Cuticura Soap and Ointment Completely Cured. Now Has Long Hair.

advertisements.description: A store for men of judgment, not necessarily men of means. Sells Palm Beach, Panama, and Poplin suits, Mohair and Silian coats, and Linen pants. Also specials on Shirts, Underwear, Pajamas, Night Shirts, Neckwear and Sox.
THE - HOUSE -OF VALUES. SECOND. HOUSTON & MAIN. Specials on Blouse Waists, Taffeta and Moire Silk Tailored Skirts, and Underwear.
KING OF BEVERAGES. LIQUID SUNSHINE. IS MADE IN A CLEAN FACTORY. The extreme care-the hygienic cleanliness-used in making as well as shipping Dr. Pepper, means a lot to you.
